description: In or out of the water, these nike floaters will go with you anywhere. Wear these to the great outdoors with confidence and style. Upper Synthetic straps for durability and easy maintenance Cushioning inside straps for comfortable Fit Adjustable velcro closures on ankle and front straps for a snug, customised fit Cushioned PU footbed Pull loop at back heel nike branding Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight feel and shock absorption Outsole All-Trac amphibious outsole Agressive lugs for absolute grip on all terrains Sandal care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
